# Test showing callgraph doesn't connect scripttest to programs it executes
# This is self-referential - using mcpscripttest to test mcpscripttest's callgraph limitation

# Create a simple test that calls a program
mkdir testdir
exec cat > testdir/simple.txt << 'EOF'
exec echo "Hello from test"
stdout 'Hello'
EOF

# Run mcpscripttest on our simple test
exec mcpscripttest -- echo "dummy server"
grep 'simple.txt'
stdout 'simple.txt.*PASS'

# Now run callgraph on mcpscripttest itself
exec which mcpscripttest
cp stdout scripttest_path.txt
exec callgraph -algo static $(cat scripttest_path.txt)
cp stdout callgraph_output.txt

# Try to find echo's main function - this will fail
exec grep 'echo.*main' callgraph_output.txt
! stdout .

# Try to find any exec.Command calls (how tests execute programs)
exec grep 'exec\.Command' callgraph_output.txt
grep 'exec\.Command'
stdout 'exec\.Command'

# But we can't see what specific programs it calls (like echo)
exec grep 'echo' callgraph_output.txt
! stdout 'echo.*main'

# This shows the gap: callgraph sees that mcpscripttest uses exec.Command
# but doesn't know which specific programs it executes
